tier1.title: Hi-C chromatin conformation pipeline
tier1.oneLiner: Performed differential analysis on Hi-C loops, TADs, & compatments between conditions at two timepoints; clustered and annotated loop anchors/spans.

tier1.title: DNA methylation (Biomodal DUET evoC)
tier1.oneLiner: Profiled simultaneous hypermethylation / hypo-hydroxymethylation at euchromatic, coordinated, & neuronal/synaptic gene bodies with histone modifications.

tier1.title: Post-synaptic CNS membrane protein MD
tier1.oneLiner: Modeled the 5-HT2A recepter bound to psilocin coupled to Gi/Gq proteins; differentially analyzed RMSD/RMSF, lipid contacts, & molecular dynamics.

tier1.title: MPro allosteric pathway analysis
tier1.oneLiner: Refactored and ran analysis on the COVID main protease at the Amaro Lab; used WISP to identify suboptimal communication pathways across proteins.

tier1.title: Cleave
tier1.oneLiner: Self-hosted CUTRUN and RNA-seq Bioinformatics GUI platform; runs full FASTQ trimming, QC, alignment, peak-calling, Diffbind, normalization, & figure generation pipelines. Enables automatic processing of large datasets and accessible collaboration between lab members.

tier1.title: MetaENCODE
tier1.oneLiner: Interactive web app to help researchers discover related biological datasets from the Encyclopedia of DNA Elements (ENCODE) through metadata-driven similarity scoring. Allows visualization of relationships between epigenetic data. Collaboration with DS3 x UBIC.

tier2.title: GPTPortal
tier2.oneLiner: My first project -- an initially simple Node.js/Express portal to query various LLM APIs with integrated embeddings -- blew up and encouraged me to keep building.

tier2.title: AO3-Explorer
tier2.oneLiner: A small React/TS SPA to scrape my reading history and organize three years worth (400M+ words) into categories with fun visualizations gained a stable following.

tier2.title: YeastMSA
tier2.oneLiner: Multiple sequence alignment and variant analysis, with subsequent network and sterol comparisons revealed some intriguing patterns in ergostatic yeast pathways.

tier2.title: Crime-Analysis
tier2.oneLiner: My first data analysis pipeline; I aggregated government data for a research report on the intersectionality between incarceration, crime rates, & political leanings.

tier2.title: WebReg
tier2.oneLiner: I learned enough Rust to set up a server that polled my enrollment system to check for waitlisted spots and automically enroll me in the classes I wanted first.
